title: Fix handling of command in images
body:
Currently we are dropping the command entry from the create
line and using the image Cmd.  This change will only use the
image Cmd if the user did not specify a Cmd.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM. (Sorry for the delay; it took me a while to get up to speed on the data structures). Thanks for your quick action on this.
